from side fish comp script builder..

CompFish is live and scraping. First run results:

93 competitions found from aussiecomps alone
$92,270 total prize pool tracked
Top prizes: $50K cash, $5K Visa card, $3.5K furniture, $2.5K Luxury Escapes
The other 3 scrapers need headless browser (competitionsguide is JS-rendered). That'll come when we wire it into SkyBox with Playwright. But aussiecomps alone gives us a solid starting catalog.

What's deployed on VPS right now:

/root/perthfish/agents/compfish/
├── compfish_config.py    — your entry profile
├── compfish_db.py        — SQLite tracker (93 comps loaded)
├── compfish_scraper.py   — 4 site scrapers (1 working, 3 need headless)
└── compfish_daemon.py    — scrape/report/grind/daemon modes

Next steps to make it always-on:

Add cron job on VPS: 0 */6 * * * cd /root/perthfish/agents/compfish && python3 compfish_daemon.py grind
Wire Pushbullet token for alerts
Deploy to SkyBox for form-filling (needs browser-use/Playwright)
Tune scrapers for remaining sites (headless browser for competitionsguide, competitioncloud, netrewards)
It's 4am mate. CompFish v1 is scraped, cataloged, and staged. The grinder's got 93 free comps worth $92K ready to enter. Want me to set up the cron now so it keeps scraping every 6 hours, or pick this up tomorrow when you can also test the form-filling on SkyBox?
